content.text: Perfect! Now I have a good understanding of the codebase. Let me compile my findings into a comprehensive summary: ## Summary of Codebase Exploration I've thoroughly explored the codebase and found the key files related to discount templates and rendering patterns. Here are my findings: ### 1. **Discount Template File** - **Path:** `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/discount/template.js` **Key Code:** ```javascript const getDiscount = (price, priceWithoutDiscount) => { if (!isPositiveFiniteNumber(price) || !isPositiveFiniteNumber(priceWithoutDiscount)) return; return Math.floor(((priceWithoutDiscount - price) / priceWithoutDiscount) * 100); }; const createDiscountTemplate = () => (context, value) => { const { price, priceWithoutDiscount } = value; const discount = getDiscount(price, priceWithoutDiscount); return discount === undefined ? `` : `${discount}%`; }; ``` ### 2. **Price Template Files** - **Main Price Template:** `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/template.js` (550+ lines) - **Price Index:** `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/index.js` - **Price Utilities:** `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/utilities.js` **Key Price Template Functions:** - `createPriceTemplate()` - Main price formatter with options for strikethrough, optical, annual, etc. - `createPromoPriceTemplate()` - Promo price with old price display - `formatPrice()` - Core formatting function using format strings and locale ### 3. **Attribute Patterns & Rendering** **Inline Price Attributes** (from `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/inline-price.js`): ```javascript static get observedAttributes() { return [ 'data-display-old-price', 'data-display-per-unit', 'data-display-recurrence', 'data-display-tax', 'data-display-plan-type', 'data-display-annual', 'data-perpetual', 'data-promotion-code', 'data-force-tax-exclusive', 'data-template', // Key: Template selection attribute 'data-wcs-osi', 'data-quantity', ]; } ``` ### 4. **Template Selection & Rendering** **Template Registry** (from `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price.js`): ```javascript const { template } = options; switch (template) { case 'discount': method = discount; break; case 'strikethrough': method = priceStrikethrough; break; case 'promo-strikethrough': method = pricePromoStrikethrough; break; case 'annual': method = priceAnnual; break; // ... other templates default: method = options.promotionCode ? pricePromo : price; } ``` ### 5. **Formatting Utilities** **Key Utilities** (from `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/utilities.js`): - `formatPrice()` - Formats price with currency symbol, decimals, locale-specific formatting - `formatOpticalPrice()` - Formats as monthly equivalent - `formatAnnualPrice()` - Handles annual pricing with promotions - `makeSpacesAroundNonBreaking()` - Converts spaces to non-breaking spaces - `getCurrencySymbolDetails()` - Extracts currency placement and spacing from format string **CSS Class Patterns** (from price/template.js): ```javascript const cssClassNames = { container: 'price', containerOptical: 'price-optical', containerStrikethrough: 'price-strikethrough', containerPromoStrikethrough: 'price-promo-strikethrough', containerAlternative: 'price-alternative', containerAnnual: 'price-annual', currencySymbol: 'price-currency-symbol', decimals: 'price-decimals', integer: 'price-integer', recurrence: 'price-recurrence', taxInclusivity: 'price-tax-inclusivity', unitType: 'price-unit-type', }; ``` ### 6. **Attribute Rendering Utility** **Universal Attribute Handler** (from `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/template.js`): ```javascript export const renderAttributes = (attributes) => isObject(attributes) ? Object.entries(attributes) .filter(([, value]) => isString(value) || isNumber(value) || value === true) .reduce((html, [key, value]) => html + ` ${key}${value === true ? '' : '="' + escapeHtml(value) + '"'}` , '') : ''; ``` This function shows how custom attributes are rendered on span elements - supporting strings, numbers, and boolean flags. ### 7. **Test Snapshots** **Example Discount Template Output** (from `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/test/price/__snapshots__/price.snapshots.js`): ```html 20% ``` ### 8. **Data Structure for Templates** The templates expect a value object with these properties: - `price` - Discounted/current price - `priceWithoutDiscount` - Original price (for calculating discount percentage) - `formatString` - Currency format pattern (e.g., `"'US$' #,##0.00"`) - `term` - Billing term (MONTHLY, ANNUAL, etc.) - `commitment` - Commitment type (YEAR, MONTH, PERPETUAL) - `promotion` - Promotion details (if any) - `taxDisplay` - Tax inclusion/exclusion setting - `usePrecision` - Whether to show decimals **Files Overview:** - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/discount/template.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/discount/index.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/template.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price/utilities.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/price.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/src/inline-price.js` - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/93056489/web-components/test/discount/template.test.js`

import { STATE_FAILED, FF_DEFAULTS, FF_ANNUAL_PRICE } from './constants.js';
import { createMasElement, MasElement } from './mas-element.js';
import { selectOffers, sumOffers, getService } from './utilities.js';
import { Defaults } from './defaults.js';

const INDIVIDUAL = 'INDIVIDUAL_COM';
const BUSINESS = 'TEAM_COM';
const STUDENT = 'INDIVIDUAL_EDU';
const UNIVERSITY = 'TEAM_EDU';

// countries where tax is displayed for all segments by default
const DISPLAY_ALL_TAX_COUNTRIES = [
    'AT_de',
    'AU_en',
    'BE_en',
    'BE_fr',
    'BE_nl',
    'BG_bg',
    'CH_de',
    'CH_fr',
    'CH_it',
    'CZ_cs',
    'DE_de',
    'DK_da',
    'EE_et',
    'EG_ar',
    'EG_en',
    'ES_es',
    'FI_fi',
    'FR_fr',
    'GB_en',
    'GR_el',
    'GR_en',
    'HU_hu',
    'ID_en',
    'ID_id',
    'ID_in',
    'IE_en',
    'IN_en',
    'IN_hi',
    'IT_it',
    'JP_ja',
    'LU_de',
    'LU_en',
    'LU_fr',
    'MY_en',
    'MY_ms',
    'MU_en',
    'NL_nl',
    'NO_nb',
    'NZ_en',
    'PL_pl',
    'PT_pt',
    'RO_ro',
    'SE_sv',
    'SI_sl',
    'SK_sk',
    'TH_en',
    'TH_th',
    'TR_tr',
    'UA_uk',
];

// countries where tax is displayed for some segments only by default
const DISPLAY_TAX_MAP = {
    [INDIVIDUAL]: [
        'LT_lt',
        'LV_lv',
        'NG_en',
        'SA_ar',
        'SA_en',
        'SG_en',
        'KR_ko',
        'ZA_en',
    ],
    [BUSINESS]: ['LT_lt', 'LV_lv', 'NG_en', 'CO_es', 'KR_ko', 'ZA_en'],
    [STUDENT]: ['LT_lt', 'LV_lv', 'SA_en', 'SG_en', 'SA_ar'],
    [UNIVERSITY]: ['SG_en', 'KR_ko'],
};

tool_input.content: # Plan: Add display-savings attribute to discount template ## Task Description Add a `data-display-savings` attribute to the discount template that renders the absolute dollar savings amount (e.g., "Save $120/yr") alongside the existing percentage display (e.g., "40%"). When the attribute is absent, behavior must remain identical to the current implementation. Savings are only rendered when positive. ## Relevant Files - `web-components/src/discount/template.js` — **Edit**: core change; add savings computation and conditional rendering - `web-components/src/discount/index.js` — Read-only reference; no changes needed - `web-components/src/inline-price.js` — **Edit**: add `data-display-savings` to `observedAttributes` and `createInlinePrice` options - `web-components/src/price.js` — **Edit**: add `displaySavings` to `collectPriceOptions` - `web-components/src/price/utilities.js` — Read-only reference; use existing `formatPrice` for currency formatting - `web-components/test/discount/template.test.js` — **Edit**: add test cases for display-savings behavior ## Step by Step Tasks ### 1. Add `data-display-savings` to `InlinePrice.observedAttributes` in `inline-price.js` - In the `observedAttributes` static getter (line ~219), add `'data-display-savings'` to the array - In `createInlinePrice`, destructure and forward `displaySavings` in the options passed to `createMasElement` ### 2. Add `displaySavings` to `collectPriceOptions` in `price.js` - In `collectPriceOptions` (line ~27), add `displaySavings` to the destructuring of `Object.assign(options, placeholder?.dataset ?? {}, overrides ?? {})` - Add `displaySavings: toBoolean(displaySavings)` in the options object returned (follow the same pattern as `displayOldPrice`, `displayPerUnit`, etc.) ### 3. Modify `createDiscountTemplate` in `web-components/src/discount/template.js` - Import `formatPrice` from `'../price/utilities.js'` - Update `createDiscountTemplate` to receive and use `context` properly (it already receives `context` as first arg of the returned function) - After computing `discount`, also compute `savingsAmount = priceWithoutDiscount - price` - When `context.displaySavings === true` AND `savingsAmount > 0` AND `discount !== undefined`: - Format the savings using `formatPrice({ formatString: value.formatString, price: savingsAmount, usePrecision: value.usePrecision })` — use `.accessiblePrice` from the result as the currency-formatted string - Append a `Save ${formattedSavings}` after the discount percentage span - When condition is not met, render only the existing markup (backwards compatible) Example output when `display-savings` is active: ```html 10%Save US$3.00 ``` or as a sibling span: ```html 10%Save US$3.00 ``` Follow the existing pattern in the file — use a sibling span to keep the percentage span intact. ### 4. Add test cases in `web-components/test/discount/template.test.js` - Add test: `display-savings` absent → output is unchanged (existing markup only) - Add test: `display-savings` present, savings > 0 → percentage span + savings span rendered - Add test: `display-savings` present, price === priceWithoutDiscount (zero savings) → no savings span rendered - Add test: `display-savings` present, no `formatString` in value → gracefully omit savings span (defensive) ## Acceptance Criteria - When `data-display-savings` attribute is not present, rendered HTML is byte-for-byte identical to current output - When `data-display-savings` is present and `priceWithoutDiscount > price > 0`, a savings element appears with the absolute currency amount formatted per the locale `formatString` - When savings amount is zero or negative, no savings element is rendered even if `data-display-savings` is set - `data-display-savings` appears in `InlinePrice.observedAttributes` so attribute changes trigger re-render - `displaySavings` is processed by `collectPriceOptions` with `toBoolean()` consistent with other display flags - All existing discount template tests continue to pass ## Validation Commands - `node --check web-components/src/discount/template.js` - `node --check web-components/src/inline-price.js` - `node --check web-components/src/price.js`
